overview: An AI-powered memory assistant using spaced repetition and forgetting curve prediction to help users retain knowledge. Features adaptive study scheduling, daily review queues, progress tracking, and a detailed analytics dashboard with charts.
features: Flashcard creation with rich text question/answer editor
Forgetting curve prediction with next review countdown
Daily study queue with overdue items prioritization
Analytics dashboard with progress charts and heatmaps
Study streak tracking and retention rate stats
In-app toast reminders for overdue items
